---
title: "Abbey Kealey"
image: images/stiff_yellow_flax.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 20em
  links: 
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ramon-melser-666932129/
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter/X
      href: https://x.com/MelserRamon
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ramonmelser
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: Email
      href: mailto:melser@student.ubc.ca
---

This is a Stiff Yellow Flax plant.
